name: Gluten Free, Egg Free Brownies
directions: Preheat oven to 350.
Melt margerine.
Mix dry ingredients togther.
Add wet ingredients and stir until well blended.
Put in a greased 9X9 pan.
Bake for 15-20 min, or until a toothpick comes out clean.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Peanut Butter Cookie Dough Lara-Like Bars

name: Vegan Chocolate Mousse
directions: Place almond milk and chocolate chips in a microwave-safe bowl and heat about 1 minute depending on your microwave. Stir together until chocolate chips are dissolving in milk, you should now have a rich chocolate milk. If necessary, heat a bit a longer. Let the mixutre cool for a few minutes.

Add chocolate mixture, tofu, and vanilla to a food processor or blender and process until pureed. This is important: taste the mixture to make sure you don't a have a tofu taste since all brands are different. If it's not chocolaty enough you can melt some more chocolate chips and add it but don't add any more milk or it won't set properly.
Pour into 4-5 ramekins or small dishes. It will set better this way than if it's in one big bowl. Chill 2-3 hours and it's ready to eat!

name: Vegan Antioxidant Cookies
directions: Cream margarine, sugar and vanilla together until light and fluffy. Add oil, beating well. Sift flour and baking powder together and mix into creamed mixture. Add cranberries and mix well. Roll heaped teaspoonful of mixture into balls and place on an oven tray. Flatten slightly with a floured spoon or fork. Bake at 190 C for about 12 minutes or until pale golden. Cool on a cooling rack.

name: Hot Fudge Brownie Lara-Like Bars
directions: Mix all ingredients in food processor. If too dry, add up to 1 T water.
Form into 3 bars or 6 snack-sized balls.

name: Samoa-Like, Larabar-Like Bars.
